Schema ucmis_mapping_configuration.schema.json
Document version Draft 2020-12
file:/media/wackerow/Shared/Git/github/ucmism2m/configuration/ucmis_mapping_configuration.schema.json
Annotations
 
Title  JSON Schema for UCMIS mapping configuration

Description  This JSON Schema is used to validate the UCMIS mapping configuration. With such a mapping, a submodel can be created from a UCMIS model. UCMIS is the UML Class Model Interoperable Subset.
Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
transformation
package
mapping
 optional
optional
optional
optional
Additional Properties false
Source
 

{
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "JSON Schema for UCMIS mapping configuration",
  "description": "This JSON Schema is used to validate the UCMIS mapping configuration. With such a mapping, a submodel can be created from a UCMIS model. UCMIS is the UML Class Model Interoperable Subset.",
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$comment": "Some details on UCMIS. UCMIS uses the following classes from the UML metamodel: Association, Classifier, Comment, Dependency, Element, Enumeration, Generalization, MultiplicityElement, NamedElement, Package, Property, StructuredClassifier, TypedElement. UCMIS uses the following XMI types: Association, Class, Comment, DataType, Dependency, Enumeration, EnumerationLiteral, Generalization, LiteralInteger, LiteralString, LiteralUnlimitedNatural, Model, Package, PrimitiveType, Property. This configuration addresses only a subset of them. UCMIS uses single inheritance. UCMIS uses binary associations, which can be understood as a triple, consisting of the subject class, the association name as the predicate, and the object class. Associations are located in the package of the object class.",
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "transformation": {"$ref": "#/$defs/transformation_type"},
    "package": {"$ref": "#/$defs/targetPackage_type"},
    "mapping": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mapping_type"}
  }
}

#/schema

 "_comment": {"type": "string"}

Schema transformation_type
Annotations
 
Description  Generic definition of the transformation. Note: all transformations flatten inheritance. Class attribute and association names may contain inherited names. All definitions, data types used by class attributes, multiplicities of class attributes and association ends, and aggregation kinds of associations are automatically reused in the target model unless they are explicitly overwritten.
Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
description
version
sourceModel
targetModel
 optional
required
required
required
required
Additional Properties false
Used by
Schema
transformation
#/schema
Source
 

 "transformation_type": {
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "description": "Generic definition of the transformation. Note: all transformations flatten inheritance. Class attribute and association names may contain inherited names. All definitions, data types used by class attributes, multiplicities of class attributes and association ends, and aggregation kinds of associations are automatically reused in the target model unless they are explicitly overwritten.",
  "required": [
    "description",
    "version",
    "sourceModel",
    "targetModel"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "description": {"type": "string"},
    "version": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "The version of this mapping configuration."
    },
    "sourceModel": {"$ref": "#/$defs/sourceModel_type"},
    "targetModel": {"$ref": "#/$defs/targetModel_type"}
  }
}

  "description": "The version of this mapping configuration."
}

Schema sourceModel_type
Annotations
 
Title  Source model definition

Description  Identifies the UCMIS source model by name, main package, and URI.
Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
name
mainPackage
uri
 optional
required
required
required
Additional Properties false
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/transformation_type/properties/sourceModel
#/$defs/transformation_type
Source
 

 "sourceModel_type": {
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "Source model definition",
  "description": "Identifies the UCMIS source model by name, main package, and URI.",
  "required": [
    "name",
    "mainPackage",
    "uri"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "name": {"$ref": "#/$defs/modelName_type"},
    "mainPackage": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Main package name",
      "description": "The main package in the source model that contains all the mentioned classes and associations, including those within its subpackages."
    },
    "uri": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "title": "URI",
      "description": "The URI of the model namespace."
    }
  }
}

Schema _comment
Diagram
Type string
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/sourceModel_type
Source
 

 "_comment": {"type": "string"}

Schema modelName_type
Annotations
 
Title  Model name

Description  Must start with a letter; subsequent characters may be letters, digits, or hyphens.
Diagram
Type string
Constraints
 
Pattern : ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*$
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/sourceModel_type/properties/name
#/$defs/sourceModel_type
#/$defs/targetModel_type
Source
 

 "modelName_type": {
  "type": "string",
  "pattern": "^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9-]*$",
  "title": "Model name",
  "description": "Must start with a letter; subsequent characters may be letters, digits, or hyphens."
}

Definition schema name
Diagram
Type reference
Refers modelName_type
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/sourceModel_type
Source

Schema elementName_type
Annotations
 
Title  Element name

Description  Only letters in CamelCase are permitted.
Diagram
Type string
Constraints
 
Pattern : ^[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*$

Schema

#/$defs/association_type/items
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/0

  "type": "string",
  "pattern": "^[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*$",
  "title": "Element name",
  "description": "Only letters in CamelCase are permitted."
}

Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
acronym
modelTitle
subTitle
majorVersion
minorVersion
language
uri
definition
mainPackage
mainPackageDefinition
dataTypesPackage
 optional
required

Used by

#/$defs/transformation_type/properties/targetModel

Source
 

 "targetModel_type": {
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "Target model definition",
  "description": "Describes the UCMIS target model by name, URI, and other details.",
  "required": [
    "acronym",
    "modelTitle",
    "subTitle",
    "majorVersion",
    "minorVersion",
    "language",
    "uri",
    "definition",
    "mainPackage",
    "mainPackageDefinition",
    "dataTypesPackage"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "acronym": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/modelName_type",
      "title": "Acronym"
    },
    "modelTitle": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Title"
    },
    "subTitle": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Subtitle"
    },
    "majorVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Major version"
    },
    "minorVersion": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Minor version"
    },
    "language": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Language of the definitions in the model"
    },
    "uri": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "title": "URI",
      "description": "The URI of the model namespace."
    },
    "definition": {
      "type": "string",
      "title": "Definition"
    },
    "mainPackage": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Main package name",
      "description": "The main package in the target model that contains all the mentioned classes and associations, including those within its subpackages."
    },
    "mainPackageDefinition": {"type": "string"},
    "dataTypesPackage": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Main package name for data types",
      "description": "The data types package in the target model that contains all required data types according to the structure in the source model, including those within its subpackages."
    }
  }
}

Schema targetPackage_type
Annotations
 
Title  Target packages

Description  Defines additional packages in the target model. Each entry specifies a package name, its parent, and a definition.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/targetPackage_type/items
Used by
Schema
package
#/schema
Source
 

 "targetPackage_type": {
  "type": "array",
  "title": "Target packages",
  "description": "Defines additional packages in the target model. Each entry specifies a package name, its parent, and a definition.",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": false,
    "required": [
      "name",
      "parent",
      "definition"
    ],
    "properties": {
      "_comment": {"type": "string"},
      "name": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Package name"
      },
      "parent": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Parent package name or model name",
        "description": "The name of the parent package or model in the case of a top-level package."
      },
      "definition": {
        "type": "string",
        "title": "Definition"
      }
    }
  }
}

 optional

optional

#/schema
Source

  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "Mapping of classes and associations",
  "description": "Contains the class and association mapping definitions.",
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "class": {"$ref": "#/$defs/class_type"},
    "association": {"$ref": "#/$defs/association_type"}
  }
}

Schema _comment
Diagram
Type string
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/mapping_type
Source
 

 "_comment": {"type": "string"}

Schema class_type
Annotations
 
Title  Class mappings

Description  Class mapping definitions. Supports three mapping types: 'map' for direct source-to-target mapping, 'new' for target classes with no source equivalent, and 'merge' for merging two source classes into one target class.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/class_type/items
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/mapping_type/properties/class
#/$defs/mapping_type
Source
 

 "class_type": {
  "type": "array",
  "minItems": 1,
  "title": "Class mappings",
  "description": "Class mapping definitions. Supports three mapping types: 'map' for direct source-to-target mapping, 'new' for target classes with no source equivalent, and 'merge' for merging two source classes into one target class.",
  "items": {
    "oneOf": [
      {
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "title": "Mapping type 'map'",
        "required": [
          "mappingType",
          "sourceClass",
          "targetPackage",
          "targetClass"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "_comment": {"type": "string"},
          "mappingType": {
            "const": "map",
            "title": "Direct source-to-target mapping"
          },
          "sourceClass": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Source class"
          },
          "targetPackage": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target package"
          },
          "targetClass": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target class"
          },
          "definitionFrom": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Source class of definition",
            "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
          },
          "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mapAttribute_type"},
          "sssom": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
            "title": "SSSOM Details",
            "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "title": "Mapping type 'new'",
        "required": [
          "mappingType",
          "targetPackage",
          "targetClass",
          "definition",
          "attribute"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "_comment": {"type": "string"},
          "mappingType": {
            "const": "new",
            "title": "Target class with no source equivalent"
          },
          "targetPackage": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target package"
          },
          "targetClass": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target class"
          },
          "definition": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Definition"
          },
          "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/newAttribute_type"},
          "sssom": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
            "title": "SSSOM Details",
            "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
          }
        }
      },
      {
        "additionalProperties": false,
        "title": "Mapping type 'merge'",
        "required": [
          "mappingType",
          "sourceClass",
          "targetPackage",
          "targetClass"
        ],
        "properties": {
          "_comment": {"type": "string"},
          "mappingType": {
            "const": "merge",
            "title": "Merging two source classes into one target class"
          },
          "sourceClass": {
            "type": "array",
            "minItems": 2,
            "maxItems": 2,
            "title": "Two source classes",
            "description": "Exactly two source classes to be merged into the target class.",
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
              "title": "Source class"
            }
          },
          "targetPackage": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target package"
          },
          "targetClass": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Target class"
          },
          "definitionFrom": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Source class of definition",
            "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
          },
          "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type"},
          "sssom": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
            "title": "SSSOM Details",
            "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
          }
        }
      }
    ],
    "type": "object"
  }
}

Schema items
Diagram
Type object
All of
Choices
items : Schema (#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf)
items : Schema (#/$defs/class_type/items/0)
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type
Source
 

 "items": {
  "oneOf": [
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'map'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "sourceClass",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "map",
          "title": "Direct source-to-target mapping"
        },
        "sourceClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class"
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definitionFrom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class of definition",
          "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mapAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'new'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass",
        "definition",
        "attribute"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "new",
          "title": "Target class with no source equivalent"
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definition": {
          "type": "string",
          "title": "Definition"
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/newAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'merge'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "sourceClass",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "merge",
          "title": "Merging two source classes into one target class"
        },
        "sourceClass": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 2,
          "maxItems": 2,
          "title": "Two source classes",
          "description": "Exactly two source classes to be merged into the target class.",
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Source class"
          }
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definitionFrom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class of definition",
          "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "type": "object"
}

Schema items/oneOf
Diagram
Type object
One of
Choices
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf : Schema (0)
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf : Schema (1)
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf : Schema (2)
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type/items
Source
 

 "items/oneOf": {
  "oneOf": [
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'map'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "sourceClass",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "map",
          "title": "Direct source-to-target mapping"
        },
        "sourceClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class"
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definitionFrom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class of definition",
          "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mapAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'new'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass",
        "definition",
        "attribute"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "new",
          "title": "Target class with no source equivalent"
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definition": {
          "type": "string",
          "title": "Definition"
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/newAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "title": "Mapping type 'merge'",
      "required": [
        "mappingType",
        "sourceClass",
        "targetPackage",
        "targetClass"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "_comment": {"type": "string"},
        "mappingType": {
          "const": "merge",
          "title": "Merging two source classes into one target class"
        },
        "sourceClass": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 2,
          "maxItems": 2,
          "title": "Two source classes",
          "description": "Exactly two source classes to be merged into the target class.",
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
            "title": "Source class"
          }
        },
        "targetPackage": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target package"
        },
        "targetClass": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Target class"
        },
        "definitionFrom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
          "title": "Source class of definition",
          "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
        },
        "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type"},
        "sssom": {
          "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
          "title": "SSSOM Details",
          "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}

Schema mapAttribute_type
Annotations
 
Title  Mapped attribute

Description  Attribute definition for a mapped class. All properties except 'name' are optional; missing values are used from the source class.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/mapAttribute_type/items
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/0/properties/attribute
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/0
Source
 

 "mapAttribute_type": {
  "type": "array",
  "title": "Mapped attribute",
  "description": "Attribute definition for a mapped class. All properties except 'name' are optional; missing values are used from the source class.",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": false,
    "required": ["name"],
    "properties": {
      "_comment": {"type": "string"},
      "name": {"$ref": "#/$defs/attributeName_type"},
      "dataType": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Data type",
        "description": "The data type is one of the available types in the source model. This approach doesn't allow to define new data types."
      },
      "definition": {
        "type": "string",
        "title": "Definition"
      },
      "multiplicity": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicity_type"}
    }
  }
}

  "type": "string",
  "pattern": "^[a-z][a-zA-Z]*$",
  "title": "Attribute name",
  "description": "Only letters in lowerCamelCase are permitted."
}

Schema multiplicity_type
Annotations
 
Title  Multiplicity

Description  Permitted values are a single digit (0–9) or * for unlimited.
Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
lower
upper
 optional
required
required
Additional Properties false
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/mapAttribute_type/items/properties/multiplicity
#/$defs/association_type/items
#/$defs/mapAttribute_type/items
#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type/items
#/$defs/newAttribute_type/items
Source
 

 "multiplicity_type": {
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "Multiplicity",
  "description": "Permitted values are a single digit (0–9) or * for unlimited.",
  "required": [
    "lower",
    "upper"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "lower": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicityRange_type"},
    "upper": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicityRange_type"}
  }
}

Schema _comment
Diagram
Type string
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/multiplicity_type
Source
 

 "_comment": {"type": "string"}

Schema multiplicityRange_type
Annotations
 
Title  Multiplicity range

Description  A single digit (0–9) or * for unlimited. The range is deliberately narrow.
Diagram
Type string
Constraints
 
Pattern : ^[0-9*]$
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/multiplicity_type/properties/lower
#/$defs/multiplicity_type
Source
 

 "multiplicityRange_type": {
  "type": "string",
  "pattern": "^[0-9*]$",
  "title": "Multiplicity range",
  "description": "A single digit (0–9) or * for unlimited. The range is deliberately narrow."
}

Schema sssom_type

Title  SSSOM Properties

Diagram
Type object
Properties
Name Occurrence
_comment
subject_label
object_label
predicate_id
predicate_label
confidence
comment
 optional
optional
optional
required
optional
optional
optional
Additional Properties false
Used by

Source
 

 "sssom_type": {
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "SSSOM Properties",
  "description": "These properties are according to the Simple Standard for Sharing Ontological Mappings (SSSOM) documentation at https://mapping-commons.github.io/sssom/linkml-index/.",
  "required": ["predicate_id"],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "subject_label": {"type": "string"},
    "object_label": {"type": "string"},
    "predicate_id": {"type": "string"},
    "predicate_label": {"type": "string"},
    "confidence": {"type": "string"},
    "comment": {"type": "string"}
  }
}

Schema newAttribute_type
Annotations
 
Title  New attribute

Description  Attribute definition for a newly created class. All properties are required since no source model exists to inherit values from.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/newAttribute_type/items
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/1/properties/attribute
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/1
Source

  "type": "array",
  "minItems": 1,
  "title": "New attribute",
  "description": "Attribute definition for a newly created class. All properties are required since no source model exists to inherit values from.",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": false,
    "required": [
      "name",
      "dataType",
      "definition",
      "multiplicity"
    ],
    "properties": {
      "_comment": {"type": "string"},
      "name": {"$ref": "#/$defs/attributeName_type"},
      "dataType": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Data type",
        "description": "The data type is one of the available types in the source model. This approach doesn't allow to define new data types."
      },
      "definition": {
        "type": "string",
        "title": "Definition"
      },
      "multiplicity": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicity_type"}
    }
  }
}

required
required
required
optional
optional
optional
Additional Properties false
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf
Source
 

{
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "title": "Mapping type 'merge'",
  "required": [
    "mappingType",
    "sourceClass",
    "targetPackage",
    "targetClass"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "_comment": {"type": "string"},
    "mappingType": {
      "const": "merge",
      "title": "Merging two source classes into one target class"
    },
    "sourceClass": {
      "type": "array",
      "minItems": 2,
      "maxItems": 2,
      "title": "Two source classes",
      "description": "Exactly two source classes to be merged into the target class.",
      "items": {}
    },
    "targetPackage": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Target package"
    },
    "targetClass": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Target class"
    },
    "definitionFrom": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
      "title": "Source class of definition",
      "description": "The name of the source class whose definition should be used for the target class definition."
    },
    "attribute": {"$ref": "#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type"},
    "sssom": {
      "$ref": "#/$defs/sssom_type",
      "title": "SSSOM Details",
      "description": "subject_id and object_id are set by the transformation."
    }
  }
}

Schema mergeAttribute_type
Annotations
 
Title  Merged class attribute

Description  Attribute definition for a merged class. Use 'fromSourceClass' to define the origin of the attribute. All properties except 'name' are optional; missing values are used from the respective source class.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/mergeAttribute_type/items
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/2/properties/attribute
#/$defs/class_type/items/oneOf/2
Source
 

 "mergeAttribute_type": {
  "type": "array",
  "title": "Merged class attribute",
  "description": "Attribute definition for a merged class. Use 'fromSourceClass' to define the origin of the attribute. All properties except 'name' are optional; missing values are used from the respective source class.",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": false,
    "required": ["name"],
    "properties": {
      "_comment": {"type": "string"},
      "name": {"$ref": "#/$defs/attributeName_type"},
      "fromSourceClass": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Source class of attribute",
        "description": "Defines the source class from which the attribute should be used in the event of a class merge."
      },
      "dataType": {
        "$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type",
        "title": "Data type",
        "description": "The data type is one of the available types in the source model. This approach doesn't allow to define new data types."
      },
      "definition": {
        "type": "string",
        "title": "Definition"
      },
      "multiplicity": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicity_type"}
    }
  }
}

Schema association_type
Annotations
 
Title  Association mapping

Description  Association mapping definitions. Only sourceAssociationName is required; other properties are reused from the source model unless explicitly overridden. Association names are unique in UCMIS models.
Diagram
Type array
Constraints
 
Unique Items : false
Array Items
Items
#/$defs/association_type/items
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/mapping_type/properties/association
#/$defs/mapping_type
Source
 

 "association_type": {
  "type": "array",
  "title": "Association mapping",
  "description": "Association mapping definitions. Only sourceAssociationName is required; other properties are reused from the source model unless explicitly overridden. Association names are unique in UCMIS models.",
  "items": {
    "type": "object",
    "additionalProperties": false,
    "required": ["sourceAssociationName"],
    "properties": {
      "_comment": {"type": "string"},
      "sourceAssociationName": {"$ref": "#/$defs/associationName_type"},
      "targetAssociationName": {"$ref": "#/$defs/associationName_type"},
      "subjectClass": {"$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type"},
      "objectClass": {"$ref": "#/$defs/elementName_type"},
      "definition": {
        "type": "string",
        "title": "Definition"
      },
      "subjectClassMultiplicity": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicity_type"},
      "objectClassMultiplicity": {"$ref": "#/$defs/multiplicity_type"},
      "objectClassAggregationKind": {
        "enum": [
          "shared",
          "composite",
          "none"
        ],
        "title": "Aggregation kind",
        "description": "Specifies the UML aggregation kind of the object class end of the association."
      }
    }
  }
}

Schema _comment
Diagram
Type string
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/association_type/items
Source
 

 "_comment": {"type": "string"}

Schema associationName_type
Annotations
 
Title  Association name

Description  This is a type of qualified association name. The underscore is the separator between the names of the association end classes and the association name, which can be understood as subject, predicate and object. Only letters in CamelCase are permitted for class names. Only letters in lowerCamelCase are permitted for pure association names. Association names in UCMIS are always fully qualified triples.
Diagram
Type string
Constraints
 
Pattern : ^[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*_[a-z][a-zA-Z]*_[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*$
Used by
Schema
#/$defs/association_type/items/properties/sourceAssociationName
#/$defs/association_type/items
Source
 

 "associationName_type": {
  "type": "string",
  "pattern": "^[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*_[a-z][a-zA-Z]*_[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*$",
  "title": "Association name",
  "description": "This is a type of qualified association name. The underscore is the separator between the names of the association end classes and the association name, which can be understood as subject, predicate and object. Only letters in CamelCase are permitted for class names. Only letters in lowerCamelCase are permitted for pure association names. Association names in UCMIS are always fully qualified triples."
}
